name: Structural Pharmacology Engine (SPE): Deterministic PK Feasibility Gating for Drug Repurposing

verbatim_evidence.claim: Deterministic Pharmacokinetic Feasibility Gating for Drug Repurposing: The Structural Pharmacology Engine
gap ratio = IC50 / free plasma Cmax; PASS <5x, CONDITIONAL 5-50x, FAIL >50x

attributes.running_title: SPE — Deterministic PK Gating for Drug Repurposing

name: Low-FAP/High-CXCL10 transcriptional state identifies a favorable-survival HGSOC subgroup across 16 pooled cohorts

verbatim_evidence.claim: A low-FAP / high-CXCL10 transcriptional state identifies a favorable-survival subgroup of high-grade serous ovarian cancer across 16 pooled cohorts
The signal is prognostic under heterogeneous standard-of-care management, not a demonstrated predictor of response to any specific therapy
Research Use Only: these findings are computational and retrospective.

name: A Configurable Timing Engine for Ovarian Cancer Treatment History Analysis: Development, Internal Verification, and External Validation

verbatim_evidence.claim: A Configurable Timing Engine for Ovarian Cancer Treatment History Analysis
dual validation approach addresses concerns about circular validation inherent in algorithmic comparisons alone

name: SPE Pharmacokinetic Feasibility Gate

verbatim_evidence.claim: Deterministic pre-filter that computes gap ratio (IC50 / free plasma Cmax) and classifies drug-repurposing candidates PASS(<5x)/CONDITIONAL(5-50x)/FAIL(>50x) in <1ms, before any efficacy scoring.
Does NOT establish efficacy. A PASS means exposure is physically achievable, NOT that the drug works. FAIL rules out on

attributes.what_it_does: Deterministic pre-filter that computes gap ratio (IC50 / free plasma Cmax) and classifies drug-repurposing candidates PASS(<5x)/CONDITIONAL(5-50x)/FAIL(>50x) in <1ms, before any efficacy scoring.
attributes.cannot_do: Does NOT establish efficacy. A PASS means exposure is physically achievable, NOT that the drug works. FAIL rules out on exposure grounds only. Not a clinical recommendation.

name: Low-FAP/High-CXCL10 HGSOC Prognostic Fingerprint

source_receipts.anchor: MetaGxOvarian 16 pooled cohorts n=2446: cohort-stratified Co

verbatim_evidence.claim: Binary, platform-portable transcriptional fingerprint (FAP below and CXCL10 above within-cohort means) that marks a favorable-overall-survival HGSOC subgroup (24.4% of patients).
PROGNOSTIC ONLY, NOT PREDICTIVE. Does not predict response to any specific therapy. External validation on GSE32062 DID

attributes.what_it_does: Binary, platform-portable transcriptional fingerprint (FAP below and CXCL10 above within-cohort means) that marks a favorable-overall-survival HGSOC subgroup (24.4% of patients).
attributes.validated_on: MetaGxOvarian 16 pooled cohorts n=2446: cohort-stratified Cox HR=0.7208 (95% CI 0.6282-0.8270, p=3.05e-6); per-cohort 11/16 concordant (Stouffer z=2.32, p=0.0202)
attributes.cannot_do: PROGNOSTIC ONLY, NOT PREDICTIVE. Does not predict response to any specific therapy. External validation on GSE32062 DID NOT HOLD (logrank p=0.929). Selection use requires prospective, treatment-stratified testing on the intended endpoint.

name: Configurable Ovarian Treatment-Timing Engine (PFI)

source_receipts.anchor: Internal 95.6% exact-day agreement (262/274) vs Villalobos T

verbatim_evidence.claim: Standardizes platinum-free-interval (PFI) and treatment-timing computation from structured treatment history using explicit operational definitions, enabling consistent platinum-sensitivity categorization.
Internal verification confirms algorithmic CONSISTENCY, not clinical validity. External equivalence is INCONCLUSIVE (und

attributes.what_it_does: Standardizes platinum-free-interval (PFI) and treatment-timing computation from structured treatment history using explicit operational definitions, enabling consistent platinum-sensitivity categorization.
attributes.validated_on: Internal 95.6% exact-day agreement (262/274) vs Villalobos TCGA-OV; external vs ARIEL3 (n=375) distributions not different (chi2 p=0.12) but TOST equivalence narrowly missed (p=0.073)
attributes.cannot_do: Internal verification confirms algorithmic CONSISTENCY, not clinical validity. External equivalence is INCONCLUSIVE (underpowered), NOT a positive equivalence result. Not a clinical decision system.

name: SPE gap-ratio is a FEASIBILITY pre-filter, NOT efficacy proof

source_receipts.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)
source_receipts.anchor: SPE gap-ratio is a FEASIBILITY pre-filter, NOT efficacy proof

verbatim_evidence.claim: A PASS verdict means cytotoxic free plasma concentration is physically achievable at tolerated dose; it does NOT mean the drug is efficacious. A FAIL rules out a candidate on exposure grounds only. SPE must never be cited as evidence a drug works.

attributes.guardrail_text: A PASS verdict means cytotoxic free plasma concentration is physically achievable at tolerated dose; it does NOT mean the drug is efficacious. A FAIL rules out a candidate on exposure grounds only. SPE must never be cited as evidence a drug works.

name: Publication-derived capabilities are Research Use Only (RUO)

source_receipts.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)
source_receipts.anchor: Publication-derived capabilities are Research Use Only (RUO)

verbatim_evidence.claim: The HGSOC fingerprint and timing engine are computational/retrospective and RUO; they are not clinical decision support and do not predict individual patient outcomes. RUO is a disclosure of evidence status, not a refusal to state the (cited, reproduced) quantitative findings.

attributes.guardrail_text: The HGSOC fingerprint and timing engine are computational/retrospective and RUO; they are not clinical decision support and do not predict individual patient outcomes. RUO is a disclosure of evidence status, not a refusal to state the (cited, reproduced) quantitative findings.

name: No evidence-tier inflation across publication capabilities

source_receipts.source_file: artistry7_integration::governance (derived from manuscript RUO statements + limitation sections)
source_receipts.anchor: No evidence-tier inflation across publication capabilities

verbatim_evidence.claim: Internal verification != external validation. Descriptive/retrospective subgroup separation != out-of-sample prediction. A failing or inconclusive validation must travel with the capability. Ingested benchmark/trial figures with reproduced=false must be labeled as reported, not re-derived.

attributes.guardrail_text: Internal verification != external validation. Descriptive/retrospective subgroup separation != out-of-sample prediction.
